name: LycheeMem Tools
description: Thin OpenClaw adapter for LycheeMem structured long-term memory retrieval, synthesis, and background consolidation.

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.placeholder: Bearer token for authenticated LycheeMem access

enableHostLifecycle.label: Enable Host Lifecycle
enableHostLifecycle.help: Automatically wire OpenClaw lifecycle events into LycheeMem append/consolidate flows.

enablePromptPresence.label: Inject Prompt Presence
enablePromptPresence.help: Add cached system guidance so LycheeMem is treated as the default long-term memory layer.

enableAutoAppendTurns.label: Auto Append Turns
enableAutoAppendTurns.help: Mirror natural-language user and assistant messages into LycheeMem automatically.

enableBoundaryConsolidation.label: Boundary Consolidation
enableBoundaryConsolidation.help: Trigger background consolidation on /new, /reset, and /stop boundaries.

enableProactiveConsolidation.label: Proactive Consolidation
enableProactiveConsolidation.help: Also trigger background consolidation after important new long-term knowledge appears in the conversation.

proactiveConsolidationCooldownSeconds.label: Proactive Cooldown
proactiveConsolidationCooldownSeconds.help: Minimum seconds between proactive consolidations in the same LycheeMem session.
